college.name: Vishwakarma Institute of Technology
college.address: 666, Upper Indiranagar, Bibwewadi, Pune – 411037, Maharashtra, India
college.accreditation: NAAC A++ (3rd consecutive cycle, CGPA 3.65/4.0, valid till 2031)
college.ugc: Recognised under UGC Act Section 2(f) & 12(B), dated 29 June 2007
college.iso: ISO 21001:2018 certified by Quality Austria Central Asia (February 2023)
college.nirf_2025: NIRF 2025 — Ranked 101–150 among engineering colleges in India
college.status: First private, self-financed autonomous engineering college in Maharashtra (2008)
college.vision: To be a globally acclaimed Institute in Technical Education and Research for holistic socio-economic development.
college.mission: To ensure that 100% of students are employable and employed in industry, higher studies, entrepreneurship, civil or defence services, government jobs, and other areas.

computer engineering.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
computer engineering.about: VIT's flagship and largest department with 720 FY seats + 72 DSE seats. Consistently top placement record with highest package of ₹56 LPA. Strong coding culture, active technical clubs.

information technology.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
information technology.about: Strong focus on practical IT skills with industry-driven curriculum and excellent placement outcomes.

artificial intelligence and data science.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
artificial intelligence and data science.about: Interdisciplinary program at the intersection of AI and data science. Very high industry demand.

computer science and engineering (ai).eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
computer science and engineering (ai).about: Cutting-edge program integrating core CS with advanced AI specializations. One of the most sought-after branches.

computer science and engineering (ai & m.full_name: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML)
computer science and engineering (ai & m.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
computer science and engineering (ai & m.about: CS fundamentals combined with AI and Machine Learning specialization — very high industry demand.

computer science and engineering (data s.full_name: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)
computer science and engineering (data s.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
computer science and engineering (data s.about: Focused on data analysis, statistical computing, and modern data engineering pipelines.

computer engineering (software engineeri.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
computer engineering (software engineeri.about: Specialized branch focused on full software development lifecycle, agile methods, and industry-ready practices.

computer science and engineering (iot an.full_name: B.Tech CSE (IoT and Cyber Security Including Blockchain Technology)
computer science and engineering (iot an.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
computer science and engineering (iot an.about: Specialized in connected systems, security, and blockchain. Rapidly growing industry demand.

electronics and telecommunication.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
electronics and telecommunication.about: One of VIT's oldest and most respected departments with strong research output and core industry ties.

mechanical engineering.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
mechanical engineering.about: Comprehensive program with strong lab infrastructure. Core industry placements with companies like Cummins, Bajaj Auto, KPIT.

chemical engineering.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
chemical engineering.about: One of the few colleges in Pune offering a dedicated Chemical Engineering program. Strong process industry placements.

civil engineering.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
civil engineering.about: Strong infrastructure with practitioner faculty. Lowest fees among VIT branches.

instrumentation engineering.eligibility: 12th PCM min 50% (45% reserved). MHT-CET / JEE Main.
instrumentation engineering.about: Niche program with excellent industry demand in automation and process control sectors.

engineering science and humanities.duration: N/A — This is a service/foundation department, not a standalone B.Tech branch
engineering science and humanities.about: Provides foundation courses in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, English Communication, and Humanities to all B.Tech students in their first two years. Not an admission branch — all B.Tech students study subjects from DESH.

dse_seda.what_is_it: DSE/SEDA allows diploma holders to enter B.Tech directly in 2nd year (3rd semester), completing the degree in 3 years instead of 4. This is also called Direct Second Year (DSY) or Lateral Entry.

eligibility.qualification: 3-year Diploma in Engineering from a recognised polytechnic institute
eligibility.marks: Minimum 45% aggregate in Diploma (40% for SC/ST/reserved categories)
eligibility.entrance_exam: MHT-CET Diploma paper (separate exam from PCM CET), conducted by State CET Cell Maharashtra

dse_seda.admission_process: Through CAP (Centralised Admission Process) by Maharashtra State CET Cell. Separate DSE CAP rounds conducted after FY B.Tech CAP. VIT college code: 6273.
dse_seda.fees: Same fee structure as regular FY B.Tech students for the corresponding branch. Fees regulated by Fees Regulating Authority (FRA), Maharashtra.
dse_seda.placements: DSE students are fully eligible for all campus placements. VIT placement cell provides bridge/crash courses for DSE students to align with B.Tech cohort. CGPA of 7.5+ recommended for competitive companies.
dse_seda.scholarships: DSE students are eligible for Government of Maharashtra scholarships (SC/ST/OBC/EBC) via MahaDBT portal. TFWS available for meritorious students.

fy_admissions.process: Through MHT-CET (PCM) or JEE Main scores via Maharashtra CAP (Centralised Admission Process)
fy_admissions.il_quota: Institute Level (IL) quota seats available — apply directly to VIT via enquiry form. IL fees differ from CAP fees. Merit-based only, no management quota.

eligibility.age: Minimum 17 years by 31st December of admission year

fy_admissions.entrance_exams: MHT-CET (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics paper) OR JEE Main (15% All India Quota seats)
fy_admissions.note: Parents are strongly advised to avoid engaging with intermediaries or agent networks. All admissions are purely merit-based.

fees.note: Fees are per academic year, regulated by Fees Regulating Authority (FRA), Maharashtra. Subject to revision. Always verify latest at https://www.vit.edu/undergraduate/

high_demand_cs_it.note: CAP fees are regulated by FRA and significantly lower than IL fees

tfws.name: Tuition Fee Waiver Scheme (TFWS)
tfws.benefit: Only ₹10,000/year — full tuition waiver for meritorious Open category students
tfws.eligibility: Very high MHT-CET percentile required (typically 95–99.8% depending on branch). Seats limited.
tfws.note: TFWS merit closes 1–1.5 percentile above regular Open category

scholarships: SC/ST/OBC/EBC/SBC/VJNT: Government of Maharashtra scholarship via MahaDBT portal (mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in)
TFWS: Full tuition waiver for top merit Open category students
Minority scholarships via central/state government portals
J&K PMSSS: Available for eligible J&K candidates

cutoffs_mhtcet.note: Approximate MHT-CET percentile cutoffs for Open category, based on 2022-2024 CAP data. 2026 cutoffs expected to rise 0.3–0.6 percentile. Reserved category cutoffs 2–14 percentile lower depending on category.

placements.overview: VIT Pune has a stellar placement track record. The Training and Placement Office ensures students are industry-ready through seminars, guest lectures, workshops and training. Every year 500+ companies visit VIT Pune for campus placements.

tpo.name: Prof. Karthick Subramanian Balasubramanian
tpo.designation: Head, Central Training and Placement Office, Vishwakarma Institutes

placements.dse_students: DSE/SEDA students fully eligible for campus placements. Bridge courses provided. CGPA 7.5+ recommended.

mtech.eligibility: B.Tech / B.E. in relevant branch + valid GATE score (mandatory for SPPU colleges)

mca.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with Mathematics at 10+2 or graduation level. Admission via MHT-CET MCA.

phd.note: Contact respective HODs for PhD availability and vacancies

library.name: Bajrangdas Lohiya Central Library
library.collection: Encyclopedias, textbooks, journals, CDs, BI standards, video courses, competitive exam materials (MPSC/UPSC)
library.software: SLIM 21EX Library Management Software with WEB OPAC

hostel.fees_approx: Approximately ₹80,000–₹1,00,000 per year (inclusive of mess charges). Exact fees vary by room type.
hostel.note: Hostel seats are limited. Apply early after admission confirmation. Many students opt for private PGs near Bibwewadi at ₹6,000–₹12,000/month.
hostel.pg_area: Bibwewadi, Katraj, and Dhankawadi areas have many affordable PG options near VIT

infrastructure.canteen: On-campus canteen with varied vegetarian and non-vegetarian options
infrastructure.sports: Cricket, Football, Basketball, Badminton, Table Tennis, Gymnasium
infrastructure.transport: Well connected via PMPML city buses. Near Bibwewadi junction, Pune.
infrastructure.language_courses: Optional language courses: Japanese, German, Sanskrit
infrastructure.labs: State-of-the-art labs in all departments with industry-standard tools and licensed software

international_relations.overview: VIT Pune's International Relations Office connects the campus with leading universities, industries and research hubs worldwide.
international_relations.mous: 50+ MoUs with international universities of repute
partner_universities: Group des Ecoles des Mines, France
17 universities from Province of Ontario, Canada
international_relations.notable: In 2016, 104 students went to NTU Singapore for a 4-week Global Internship Program. 15+ students benefit from international exposure every year.
international_relations.virtual_programs: Virtual Exchange and Online Certifications with global academic partners
international_relations.faculty_mobility: Faculty Mobility and Joint Research Initiatives available

examinations.pattern: VIT Pune is autonomous — conducts its own internal examinations independent of SPPU
examinations.note: Check https://www.vit.edu/examinations/ for latest exam timetables, hall tickets, and results

rankings_accreditation.naac: NAAC A++ grade, 3rd consecutive cycle, CGPA 3.65/4.0, valid till 2031
rankings_accreditation.ugc: Recognised under UGC Act Section 2(f) & 12(B), dated 29 June 2007

nirf.2025: Ranked 101–150 band among engineering colleges in India

other_rankings: Times Engineering Survey 2019: 9th nationally, 4th Western region, 2nd in Pune (private institutes)
The Week – Hansa Research 2019: 3rd among private engineering colleges, West Zone
World Bank TEQIP Phase-I selected institute

research.overview: Active research across all departments. Faculty and students engage in government-funded and industry-sponsored projects.

piping_engineering.name: Piping Engineering Course
piping_engineering.note: Short-term/certificate course in Piping Engineering. Contact VIT for details.

contact.address: 666, Upper Indiranagar, Bibwewadi, Pune – 411037, Maharashtra, India

clubs: CSI (Computer Society of India) Student Chapter
student_life.annual_fest: Utkarsha — VIT Pune's annual cultural and technical festival
student_life.sports_achievements: Students represent VIT at inter-university and national level competitions
student_life.mentorship: Faculty mentorship program — each student assigned a faculty mentor

alumni_notable.note: VIT Pune alumni are placed across top global companies and startups

faq.is_vit_pune_same_as_vit_vellore: No. VIT Pune (Vishwakarma Institute of Technology) is a completely separate college from VIT Vellore (Vellore Institute of Technology). They are different institutes with no affiliation.
faq.is_there_management_quota: No. VIT Pune does not have a management quota. All admissions are purely merit-based through MHT-CET/JEE CAP process or Institute Level (IL) quota on merit.
faq.is_college_autonomous: Yes. VIT Pune is autonomous since AY 2008-09 — the first private autonomous engineering college in Maharashtra. It conducts its own exams independent of SPPU.
faq.naac_grade: NAAC A++ — 3rd consecutive cycle, CGPA 3.65/4.0, valid till 2031.
faq.hostel_availability: Hostel seats are limited and allotted on first-come-first-served basis. Many students stay in private PGs near Bibwewadi.
faq.nearest_railway_station: Pune Junction (approx. 5 km). Well connected by PMPML buses.
faq.dress_code: No strict dress code. Smart/casual wear expected.
faq.total_seats: 3720 FY B.Tech seats + 366 DSE lateral entry seats across 14 programs.
